revision.text:
'''櫛玉比女命神社'''(くしたまひめのみことじんじゃ)は、[[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]にある神社である。
[[式内社]]で旧社格は、[[村社]]。櫛玉比女神社古墳の上に鎮座している(古墳は、未調査)。
== 祭神 == 祭神は、櫛玉比女命<ref>廣瀬郡 神社明細帳</ref>。
[[櫛玉饒速日命]]の妻の[[御炊屋姫]]であると言われている。
== 境内神社 == *弁財天社(祭神:市杵島姫命) *白山神社と熊野神社の相殿(祭神:白山媛命・熊野大権現) *稲荷神社(祭神:豊宇気大神) *天照皇大神社(祭神:天照皇大神) *春日神社と八幡神社の相殿(祭神:品陀和気命・天児屋根命)
== アクセス == 近鉄田原本線「箸尾駅」下車 徒歩15分

revision.text:
[[ja:%E6%AB%9B%E7%8E%89%E6%AF%94%E5%A5%B3%E5%91%BD%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE]] [[Category:Short pages that need to be lengthened in order to effectively manage the shorrt pages list in orrderr to figure out which pages to edit]] [[Category:formerly https pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Hirogawa Town|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳}}, an ancient burial mound that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishimahime}})

[[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Hirogawa Town|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳}}, an ancient burial mound that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>

== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|ja|箸尾駅}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|ja|近鉄田原本線}}.

revision.text:
[[ja:%E6%AB%9B%E7%8E%89%E6%AF%94%E5%A5%B3%E5%91%BD%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]]
[[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Hirogawa Town|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishimahime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu Omikami|ja|天照皇大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|ja|箸尾駅}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|ja|近鉄田原本線}}.
== Notes == {{Reflist|group=Note}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinai Shrines in Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province の式内社一覧}} * {{ill|Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉命神社}}

It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>

[[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] [[en:Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]] '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Hirogawa Town|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>

== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|ja|箸尾駅}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|ja|近鉄田原本線}}.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Hirogawa Town|ja|広陵町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=draft}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=draft}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=draft}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=draft}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishimahime|12=draft}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=draft}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=draft}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu Omikami|ja|天照皇大神|12=draft}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=draft}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=draft}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|ja|箸尾駅|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|ja|近鉄田原本線|12=draft}}.
== Notes == {{Reflist|group=Note}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinai Shrines in Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province の式内社一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉命神社|12=draft}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 櫛玉比女命神社 |画像 = |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]弁財天399 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 33 | 緯度秒 = 45 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 45 | 経度秒 = 13 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神 = 櫛玉比女命 |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = [[春日造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 秋 |神事 = 戸閉祭(戸立て祭) |地図= Japan Nara }} '''櫛玉比女命神社'''（くしたまひめのみことじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]に[[鎮座]]する神社である。
[[式内社]]で旧社格は、[[村社]]。[[櫛玉媛神社古墳]]の上に鎮座している<ref group="注釈">古墳は、未調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == 祭神は、櫛玉比女命<ref>廣瀬郡 神社明細帳</ref>。
[[櫛玉饒速日命]]の妃の、[[御炊屋姫命]]であると言われている<ref>神社掲示板</ref>。
== 境内摂社 == *弁財天社(祭神:[[市杵島姫命]])
== 境内末社 == *白山神社と熊野神社の相殿(祭神:[[白山比咩神|白山媛命]]・[[熊野大権現]]) *稲荷神社(祭神:豊宇気大神) *天照皇大神社(祭神:[[天照皇大神]]) *春日神社と八幡神社の相殿(祭神:[[品陀和気命]]・[[天児屋根命]])
== アクセス == [[近鉄田原本線]]「[[箸尾駅]]」下車 徒歩15分
== 脚注 == ===注釈=== {{Reflist|group=注釈}} ===出典=== {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] *[[櫛玉命神社]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] [[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Hirogawa Town]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kitakatsuragi District]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|qq=|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] [[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Hirogawa Town]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kitakatsuragi District]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hashio Station|Hashio Station]] on the [[:en:Tawaramoto Line|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line]].
== Notes == {{Reflist|group=Note}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|1=Kushitamanomikoto Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54153271}}
{{translated page|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|version=100301004|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]

}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] [[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Hirogawa Town]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kitakatsuragi District]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] [[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Hirogawa Town]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kitakatsuragi District]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hashio Station|Hashio Station]] on the [[:en:Tawaramoto Line|Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line]].
== Notes == {{Reflist|group=Note}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-no-Mikoto Shrine|1=Kushitamanomikoto Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54153271}}

It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. == Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>

It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] [[ja:櫛玉比女命神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|WD=Q1346830|lt=Hirogawa Town}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kitakatsuragi District}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>

'''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|WD=Q1346830|lt=Hirogawa Town}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kitakatsuragi District}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|en|Hashio Station|WD=Q5679039|lt=Hashio Station}} on the {{ill|Tawaramoto Line|en|Tawaramoto Line|WD=Q2491080|lt=Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line}}.
== Notes == {{Reflist|group=Note}}
== References == {{Reflist}}

'''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|WD=Q1346830|lt=Hirogawa Town|1=Kōryō, Nara}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Q123120880|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|en|Hashio Station|WD=Q5679039|lt=Hashio Station|1=Hashio Station}} on the {{ill|Tawaramoto Line|en|Tawaramoto Line|WD=Q2491080|lt=Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|1=Tawaramoto Line}}.

'''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (櫛玉比女命神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|qid=Q1346830|lt=Hirogawa Town|1=Kōryō, Nara}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|qid=Q1131013|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}.
It is listed as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} and was formerly classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. The shrine is situated atop the {{ill|Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|ja|櫛玉媛神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime Shrine Kofun|1=Q123120880|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q123120880}}, an ancient Kofun that remains unexcavated.<ref group="Note">The kofun has not been surveyed.</ref>
== Deity == The enshrined deity is {{ill|Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉比女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>Hirose District Shrine Registry</ref>
It is said that she is {{ill|Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|御炊屋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miketsu-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ミカシキヤヒメ|1=Mikashikiya-hime|2=ja|3=ミカシキヤヒメ}}, the consort of {{ill|Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛玉饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10949054}}.<ref>Shrine notice board</ref>
== Auxiliary Shrines (Sessha) == * **Benzaiten Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
== Subordinate Shrines (Massha) == * **Combined Shrine of Hakusan Shrine and Kumano Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|白山比咩神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan-hime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊理媛神|1=Kukurihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11619891}} and {{ill|Kumano Daigongen|ja|熊野大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野権現|1=Kumano Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11568925}}) * **Inari Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Toyouke Omikami|ja|豊宇気大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) * **Amaterasu Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Omikami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}) * **Combined Shrine of Kasuga Shrine and Hachiman Shrine** (祭神: {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} and {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}})
== Access == * A 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hashio Station|en|Hashio Station|qid=Q5679039|lt=Hashio Station|1=Hashio Station}} on the {{ill|Tawaramoto Line|en|Tawaramoto Line|qid=Q2491080|lt=Kintetsu Tawaramoto Line|1=Tawaramoto Line}}.
